title: YOUR LIFE YOUR VOICE HELP SERVICES - 211info
text: BOYS TOWN NATIONAL HOTLINE YOUR LIFE YOUR VOICE HELP SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 24-hour crisis, resource, and referral line. Crisis counselors provide support for issues such as abuse, anger, anxiety, bullying, coping skills, dating and break-ups, depression, eating disorders, grief, parenting and relationship problems, self-esteem, self-injury, school, stress, suicide, and self-care. Offers a mobile app with a mood journal to track feelings in writing or emojis and get tips on how to identify triggers or deal with stressful situations. 14100 Crawford Street Boys Town, NE 68010 Eligibility: At-risk children and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 448-3000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (800) 448-3000 Crisis Helpline TTY/TTD (800) 448-1833 Text Short Code 20121 Text VOICE Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or email to ask for help or visit website for more information. Texting service is intended for pre-teens, teens, and young adults. Email option available for parent and youth questions. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Bullying Helplines Dating Abuse Hotlines Parenting Helplines Runaway/Homeless Youth Helplines Youth Issues Information Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BOYS TOWN NATIONAL HOTLINE
